lang.detectedLocation: Based on your location, we suggest {{language}}.
lang.pickHint: Choose the language you want for kitchCU.
lang.browserHint: Your device language is {{language}}. Pick Marathi if you are in Maharashtra.

portal.appsBody: Customers order on the customer app. Owners run everything on the kitchen app — WhatsApp to reports, no food commission.
portal.featuresTitle: Built for how cloud kitchens actually work
portal.featuresBody: WhatsApp-first operations, honest menus, and owner control — without paying commission on every order.
portal.featureWhatsappDesc: Turn chat messages into structured orders. Confirm drafts in one tap.
portal.featureLiveDesc: Hero dish photos are captured live so customers trust what they order.
portal.featureBrandDesc: Publish a shareable storefront at /k/your-code — your brand, menu, and checkout.
portal.featureGoldenDesc: ML reads ratings and comments to pin your best cooking days and recipes.
portal.featureStreamDesc: Go live with ingredients → prep → prepared so customers see the real dish.
portal.featureTemplatesDesc: Create WhatsApp and email templates for daily menu and CRM — owned by your kitchen.
portal.featureLifecycleDesc: Track every order from received to delivered with status updates.
portal.featureDashboardDesc: Menus, orders, WhatsApp & payments, templates, growth — one kitchen workspace.
portal.howTitle: Go live in three simple steps
portal.howBody: From registration to your first WhatsApp order in under five minutes.
portal.how1Desc: Sign up as an owner, verify OTP, and create your cloud kitchen profile.
portal.how2Desc: Add dishes with live photos. Share your customer menu link.
portal.how3Desc: Accept WhatsApp orders, manage lifecycle, and grow repeat customers.
portal.pricingBody: Pay a flat monthly fee. Keep 100% of your food revenue. Scale when your kitchen grows.
portal.pricingNote: All plans include order lifecycle, live-capture menus, and customer menu links. Pilot kitchens get onboarding support. No hidden fees on orders.
portal.planStarterDesc: Perfect for home chefs launching their first cloud kitchen.
portal.planGrowthDesc: For kitchens ready to grow repeat customers and revenue.
portal.supportBody: Browse FAQs below or chat with our AI assistant — choose owner or customer mode using the chat button in the corner.
portal.contactBody: Tell us about your kitchen. We will help you go live.
portal.contactSent: Thanks — we will reach out soon.
portal.contactError: Could not send. Please try again.

home.brandShare: Share {{link}} on WhatsApp Status — kitchen-first menu & checkout.
home.goldenDesc: Peak days with strong ratings — save that recipe for the future
home.revenuePulseDesc: Last 7 days — tap Reports for full analytics
home.noRevenue: No revenue yet — share your menu link and take your first order.
